name: table-virtualized
title: Virtualized Table
description: Column-aligned table over a RowProvider, with O(visible) render cost regardless of source size. Drop in for log explorers, query result viewers, or any surface where the row count outgrows the screen by orders of magnitude.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Implement RowProvider (Len + At) over your source — slice, channel-fed buffer, sqlite cursor, mmap'd file — and pass it to WithRows. Columns require explicit Width (no auto-fit pass over the source). Sort is the caller's responsibility. The model handles cursor, scroll window, scroll affordance, and the render of the visible band.
